com.irurueta.units

Class SpeedConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.SpeedConverter

  • public class SpeedConverter
extends Object
    Does speed conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying speed measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_FOOT
      Number of meters in 1 foot.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_KILOMETER
      Number of meters in 1 kilometer.
      (package private) static double METERS_PER_MILE
      Number of meters in 1 mile.
      (package private) static double SECONDS_PER_HOUR
      Number of seconds in 1 hour.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SpeedConverter()
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static double convert(double input, SpeedUnit inputUnit, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a speed value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Number convert(Number input, SpeedUnit inputUnit, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a speed value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void convert(Speed input, Speed output)
      Converts a speed instance to provided output speed unit.
      static void convert(Speed speed, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a speed to requested output unit.
      static void convert(Speed input, SpeedUnit outputUnit, Speed result)
      Converts a speed to requested output unit.
      static Speed convertAndReturnNew(Speed input, SpeedUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a speed instance to requested output unit.
      static double feetPerSecondToMetersPerSecond(double feetPerSecond)
      Converts provided feet per second value to meters per second.
      static double kilometersPerHourToMetersPerSecond(double kilometersPerHour)
      Converts provided Kilometers per hour value to meters per second.
      static double kilometersPerSecondToMetersPerSecond(double kilometersPerSecond)
      Converts provided Kilometers per second value to meters per second.
      static double metersPerSecondToFeetPerSecond(double metersPerSecond)
      Converts provided meters per second value to feet per second.
      static double metersPerSecondToKilometersPerHour(double metersPerSecond)
      Converts provided meters per second value to Kilometers per hour.
      static double metersPerSecondToKilometersPerSecond(double metersPerSecond)
      Converts provided meters per second value to Kilometers per second.
      static double metersPerSecondToMilesPerHour(double metersPerSecond)
      Converts provided meters per second value to miles per hour.
      static double milesPerHourToMetersPerSecond(double milesPerHour)
      Converts provided miles per hour value to meters per second.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert(Speed input,
                           Speed output)
        Converts a speed instance to provided output speed unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input speed to be converted.
        output - output speed where result will be stored containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Speed convertAndReturnNew(Speed input,
                                        SpeedUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a speed instance to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input speed to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted speed.

      • convert

        public static void convert(Speed speed,
                           SpeedUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a speed to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        speed - input speed to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert(Speed input,
                           SpeedUnit outputUnit,
                           Speed result)
        Converts a speed to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input speed to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - speed instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static Number convert(Number input,
                             SpeedUnit inputUnit,
                             SpeedUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a speed value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - speed value.
        inputUnit - input speed unit.
        outputUnit - output speed unit.
        Returns:
        converted speed value.

      • convert

        public static double convert(double input,
                             SpeedUnit inputUnit,
                             SpeedUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a speed value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - speed value.
        inputUnit - input speed unit.
        outputUnit - output speed unit.
        Returns:
        converted speed value.

      • feetPerSecondToMetersPerSecond

        public static double feetPerSecondToMetersPerSecond(double feetPerSecond)
        Converts provided feet per second value to meters per second.
        Parameters:
        feetPerSecond - feet per second value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to meters per second.

      • metersPerSecondToFeetPerSecond

        public static double metersPerSecondToFeetPerSecond(double metersPerSecond)
        Converts provided meters per second value to feet per second.
        Parameters:
        metersPerSecond - meters per second value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to feet per second.

      • milesPerHourToMetersPerSecond

        public static double milesPerHourToMetersPerSecond(double milesPerHour)
        Converts provided miles per hour value to meters per second.
        Parameters:
        milesPerHour - miles per hour value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to meters per second.

      • metersPerSecondToMilesPerHour

        public static double metersPerSecondToMilesPerHour(double metersPerSecond)
        Converts provided meters per second value to miles per hour.
        Parameters:
        metersPerSecond - meters per second value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to miles per hour.

      • kilometersPerHourToMetersPerSecond

        public static double kilometersPerHourToMetersPerSecond(double kilometersPerHour)
        Converts provided Kilometers per hour value to meters per second.
        Parameters:
        kilometersPerHour - Kilometers per hour value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to meters per second.

      • metersPerSecondToKilometersPerHour

        public static double metersPerSecondToKilometersPerHour(double metersPerSecond)
        Converts provided meters per second value to Kilometers per hour.
        Parameters:
        metersPerSecond - meters per second value.
        Returns:
        same speed converted to Kilometers per hour.
